title: support pulling multiple images sequentially in a single podman pull
body:
Closes #10726 
Adds support for pulling multiple images sequentially. 

Signed-off-by: Mehul Arora <aroram18@mcmaster.ca>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body: hi @Luap99 let me know if there is anything else to be changed in docs

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
